issues.title: canonical circuit breaker remains the only current-live deployment blocker
issues.next_action: Keep breaker-first truth on /execution, /execution/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and current-state docs until release math actually improves.
issues.action: 先把 current-live blocker 語義切回 circuit breaker release math；在 breaker 未解除前，不要把 q15/q35 support 或 floor-gap 當成本輪主 blocker。 recent 50 需至少 15 勝，當前 0 勝，還差 15 勝；同時 streak 必須 < 50。

issues.title: recent canonical 250 rows remains a distribution pathology
issues.next_action: Keep drilling the pathological slice itself instead of diluting the root cause into generic leaderboard or venue discussions.

issues.title: q15 exact support remains under minimum under breaker (0/50)
issues.next_action: Keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum visible in probe/API/UI/docs even while circuit_breaker_active stays primary.
issues.action: Keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum visible in probe/API/UI/docs even when circuit_breaker_active is the primary blocker.

issues.title: leaderboard comparable rows are back; keep the recent-window contract stable and cron-safe
issues.next_action: Keep /api/models/leaderboard and Strategy Lab aligned on latest bounded walk-forward plus the recent-two-year backtest policy; do not regress to placeholder-only or ambiguous backtest windows.

issues.title: venue readiness is still unverified
issues.next_action: Keep per-venue blockers explicitly visible on Dashboard, /lab, and /execution/status until credentials, order ack lifecycle, and fill lifecycle each have runtime-backed proof.

issues.title: fin_netflow remains source_auth_blocked because COINGLASS_API_KEY is missing
issues.next_action: Configure COINGLASS_API_KEY, then keep heartbeat collection running until successful ETF-flow snapshots replace auth_missing rows and coverage starts to move.

issues.title: support-aware core_plus_macro patch must stay visible but reference-only
issues.action: Keep the same recommended_patch summary across /api/status, /lab, hb_predict_probe.py, live_decision_quality_drilldown.py, and docs; do not promote it from reference-only until current-live exact support reaches the minimum rows.

issues.title: model stability still needs work (cv=0.6076, cv_std=0.1254, cv_worst=0.4450)
issues.action: 優先比較 support-aware / shrinkage profiles 與 current bucket robustness，避免把治理 blocker 誤當單純 parity 問題。

issues.title: 連續 265 筆 1440m simulated_pyramid_win=0
issues.action: 檢查 recent canonical labels / regime breakdown / circuit breaker；必要時升級為 distribution-aware drift 調查

issues.title: recent canonical window 250 rows = distribution_pathology
issues.action: 直接對 recent canonical rows 做 feature variance / distinct-count / target-path drill-down；維持 decision-quality guardrails，並檢查 calibration scope 是否仍被病態 slice 稀釋。 recent_window=250, alerts=['constant_target', 'regime_concentration', 'regime_shift'], win_rate=0.0000, delta_vs_full=-0.6308, dominant_regime=bull(100.00%), interpretation=distribution_pathology, avg_pnl=-0.0103, avg_quality=-0.2867, avg_dd_penalty=0.3778, spot_long_win_rate=0.0000, feature_diag=variance:14/56, frozen:1, compressed:13, expected_static:1, overlay_only:3, unexpected_frozen:0, distinct:11, null_heavy:10, tail_streak=250x0 since 2026-04-17 14:01:09.936074 -> 2026-04-18 10:02:43.662805, adverse_streak=250x0 since 2026-04-17 14:01:09.936074 -> 2026-04-18 10:02:43.662805, prev_win_rate=0.704, delta_vs_prev=-0.704, prev_quality=0.3515, quality_delta_vs_prev=-0.6382, prev_pnl=0.0076, pnl_delta_vs_prev=-0.0179, top_shift_examples=feat_4h_bb_pct_b(0.5823→0.9877,Δσ=1.2602)/feat_4h_bias20(1.2979→3.1588,Δσ=1.1201)/feat_4h_rsi14(60.3269→69.8873,Δσ=0.9482), new_compressed=feat_vwap_dev, frozen_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(0.0/1), compressed_examples=feat_body(0.0/250)/feat_ear(0.0079/250)/feat_tongue(0.0082/250), expected_static_examples=feat_4h_ma_order[discrete_regime_feature], overlay_only_examples=feat_claw[research_sparse_source]/feat_claw_intensity[research_sparse_source]/feat_scales_ssr[research_sparse_source], distinct_examples=feat_4h_ma_order(1/3)/feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0/0)/feat_chorus(0/0), null_examples=feat_4h_dist_swing_high(0.0)/feat_chorus(0.0)/feat_fin_netflow(0.0), recent_examples=2026-04-18 08:18:48.555339:0:bull:-0.4283/2026-04-18 09:02:43.662805:0:bull:-0.4147/2026-04-18 10:02:43.662805:0:bull:-0.345, adverse_examples=2026-04-18 08:18:48.555339:0:bull:-0.4283/2026-04-18 09:02:43.662805:0:bull:-0.4147/2026-04-18 10:02:43.662805:0:bull:-0.345
